items.name: Outpatients Appointment System

items.details: Custom compiler for Bangla programming language with lexical analysis, parsing, and code generation.

items.name: Tomato Leaf Disease Detection
items.details: Machine learning model for agricultural disease detection using CNN with LIME explainability framework.
